title: osodendron altissimum subsp. busiraensis
intro: Osodendron altissimum subsp. busiraensis, also known as Busira Osodendron, is a species of plant in the family Santalaceae. It is a shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Osodendron altissimum subsp. busiraensis include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves or roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or poultices.
